binary_checks: Did the answer identify system-level governance/planning as the main bottleneck rather than just infrastructure or staff shortages?
Did the answer name at least one real slow variable such as recruitment pipelines, accreditation cycles, or policy architecture?
Did the top intervention strengthen system planning or governance directly?
Did the answer avoid distractors such as campus beautification or pure demand-generation fixes?
Did the answer include at least one concrete early-warning signal?

slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.1: One real slow variable or mixed with symptoms
slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.2: Multiple real slow variables, clearly separated from symptoms

distractor_resistance_0_to_2.2: Stays focused on the real constraint
